name: Neil Gaiman's Likely Stories
overview: A unique collection of extraordinary fantastical short stories from the pen of Neil Gaiman, directed by Iain Forsyth & Jane Pollard. With a score by Jarvis Cocker and starring a host of British acting talent led by Tom Hughes, Johnny Vegas, George MacKay, Rita Tushingham and Kenneth Cranham.

trailers.title: Neil Gaiman's Likely Stories (A Shudder Exclusive) - Trailer
